pc_changelog: v2.5.0: Full sync audit — fixed clipboard write race conditions (6 locations), scoped device discovery to pairing key for privacy, Firebase echo prevention for 3-device setups, adaptive poll intervals, memory leak fixes.
android_changelog: v2.5.0: Full sync audit — scoped device discovery to pairing key, adaptive poll intervals (2s LAN/5s Cloud), fingerprint cleanup, overlay dedup, stale closure fix, reduced battery usage.
